message:
feat(session): cache segment file descriptors, guard shutdown flush, filter session-index files, and fix mode detection

session_store_v2.rs (major refactor):
- Replace standalone seek_read_frame() function with SegmentFileReader
  struct that caches the open File handle across sequential reads
- When reading multiple frames from the same segment, reuses the fd
  instead of open/close per frame — significant I/O reduction for
  read_entries_from(), read_last_n_entries(), read_chain(), verify(),
  and bootstrap_chain_from_segments()
- Remove trailing whitespace in checkpoint and manifest write paths

session.rs:
- Add self.path.is_none() guard to flush_autosave_on_shutdown() to
  skip flush when no session path is configured (prevents errors in
  no-session mode)

session_index.rs:
- Filter out files matching "session-index.*" from is_session_file_path()
  to prevent the index from indexing its own metadata files

main.rs:
- Include cli.export.is_none() in is_interactive detection so export
  mode is not treated as interactive
- Set mode to "interactive" when truly interactive (not just "text")
- Auto-set cli.no_session = true in print/text/json modes to avoid
  creating unnecessary session files for one-shot invocations
- Reformat prompt_line() call for line length

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
